title: Christopher Nolan says people ‘disdain’ AI and the idea it will replace humans is ‘nonsense’
description: Odyssey director addresses industry fears over artificial intelligence and says rightwing criticism of Lupita Nyong’o as Helen of Troy is ‘irrelevant’
content:
The Oscar-winning director Christopher Nolan believes the kind of movies he makes – big-budget action films shot mostly on location – would survive the spread of artificial intelligence, a technology he says many people “disdain”.

title: Deepening Collaboration in AI-Powered R&D Acceleration: Insilico Medicine and CMS announce additional collaborations in CNS diseases
description: SHANGHAI, July 13, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Insilico Medicine ('Insilico', 03696.HK), a clinical-stage biotechnology company driven by generative artificial intelligence (AI), and China Medical System Holdings Limited ('CMS', 867.HK/8A8.SG), an open-platform innovative company linking pharmaceutical innovation and commercialization with strong product lifecycle management capability, today announced an additional AI‑empowered drug discovery collaboration targeting a mass-market indication in central nervous system with an innovative mechanism of action (MoA) identified by PandaOmics.

title: The Week in Breakingviews: Causes of correlation
description: Despite renewed hostilities in ⁠the Strait ​of Hormuz, investors remain ​obsessed with artificial intelligence. This week’s update ​argues there will ​be few places to ‌hide ⁠when the AI trade goes into reverse. Plus: looking ​for ​Japan’s ⁠missing migrants, and a gamble ​on Tobin ​taxes.

title: 5 Predictions From Sci-Fi Author Philip K. Dick That Came True
